description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a matte dark green and black finish. It is equipped with a fixed stock and a vertical foregrip for enhanced stability during firing. The rifle has a prominent upper rail system, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and a visible laser sight projecting a red beam from the barrel. The magazine is a detachable box type, inserted into the lower receiver. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of metal and polymer materials, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a fixed stock, vertical foregrip, detachable box magazine, and a visible red laser sight, finished in matte green and black.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, fixed stock, vertical foregrip, and red laser beam.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, laser emitter, and vertical foregrip directly below the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the fixed stock, magazine, and laser beam, mirroring the main features of the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the rifle's body, with the laser beam visible extending forward.
